title: I Get This Then You Blow Away
sourceTitle: I Get This Then You Blow Away
prompt: and I get this. And then you blow away my prompt? Fucking Jokes.

and I get this. And then you blow away my prompt? Fucking Jokes.

and I get this. And then you blow away my prompt? Fucking Jokes.
